basic_details.job_title: IIT Hyderabad Alumni Relations Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad (IIT Hyderabad)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad (IIT Hyderabad) Alumni Relations Manager Recruitment 2026 has been released on 13 May 2026 on the official website [IIT Hyderabad Website]. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Hyderabad Alumni Relations Manager Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged up to 35 years who have a Post-graduation/Master’s degree in any discipline with relevant experience are eligible to apply for this Alumni Relations Manager post. The online application process for IIT Hyderabad Alumni Relations Manager Recruitment 2026 has started on 13 May 2026 and will rema

qualification.details: Post-graduation/Master’s degree in any discipline with minimum 55% marks from a recognized university. Minimum 2 years experience in: a. Alumni engagement and relationship management b. Organizing alumni reunions, campus visits c. Fundraising coordination d. Maintaining alumni databases e. Liaising with stakeholders

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Hyderabad to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
